caption:
"I wish I'd done this years ago."

We hear it after almost every Botox appointment. Here's one patient's journey:

She came in at 38, frustrated by the deep "11" lines between her brows that made her look perpetually stressed—even when she was relaxed and happy.

Her treatment: 20 units of Botox to the glabellar complex, precisely placed to relax the corrugator and procerus muscles.

Day 3: Movement began to soften.
Day 10: Lines at rest nearly invisible.
Day 14: Full result. Her face finally matched how she felt inside.

Four months later, she returned for her maintenance appointment—and brought her sister.

Subtle. Natural. Unmistakably refreshed.

That's the Rani standard.

Ready to see what's possible? Book your Botox consultation today.
mediaDescription: Patient journey carousel: Slide 1 shows before photo of forehead/glabellar area at rest. Slide 2 shows the same area at day 14 post-treatment. Slide 3 is a quote card with the patient testimonial. Consistent clinical lighting, privacy-compliant photography.
